title: Build first story-site draft
goal: Implement the first narrative website draft using approved brief and design artifacts.

steps.text: Review approved brief and design artifacts before implementation.
Implement responsive page structure and core narrative sections.
Apply visual and interaction intent with accessibility baseline.
Document implementation notes and known issues for architecture/QA handoff.

acceptanceCriteria: Site draft exists and is navigable
Content and layout follow approved structure
Mobile and desktop views are functional
Handoff notes are provided for review stages

verification.text: Run local preview and verify core sections load and render as expected
